implemented_functions.name: validate_p_values
implemented_functions.description: Validate input p-values; returns {valid, errors, n}; never raises
implemented_functions.note: Required gate before any correction — rejects empty, non-numeric, NaN, out-of-range

implemented_functions.name: bonferroni_correction
implemented_functions.description: Bonferroni: adjusted_p[i] = min(p[i] × m, 1.0); rejected ← adj < alpha
implemented_functions.note: Replaces ad-hoc alpha/K thresholds in P211R/P214C/P222/P227C; threshold = alpha/m

implemented_functions.name: benjamini_hochberg_fdr
implemented_functions.description: BH-FDR: step-down monotone q-values; rejected ← q < alpha
implemented_functions.note: Supersedes bh_fdr() in p227c (kept for reference); identical algorithm, structured output

implemented_functions.name: correction_summary
implemented_functions.signature: (raw_p, adj_p, rejected, method, alpha, family_label=None) -> dict
implemented_functions.description: Build standard correction summary from pre-computed results
implemented_functions.note: SSOT output shape; always includes no_edge_claim=True, correction_required=True

implemented_functions.name: correction_gate_summary
implemented_functions.description: Run one or more corrections and return combined canonical summary
implemented_functions.note: Primary entry point; families declared here match P221F pre-registration requirement

known_use_cases: P222 cross-lottery scan: 35 strategies × 3 lotteries (Bonferroni per lottery family)
P211R IS-window: 75 tests per lottery (Bonferroni per lottery)
P219 external method sweep: 10-method family across 5 game types

supersession_notes.p227c_bh_fdr: bh_fdr() in scripts/p227c_star_box_play_dryrun_scan.py — same algorithm, structured output added
supersession_notes.p214c_apply_bonferroni: apply_bonferroni() in p214c — same formula, now with schema and no_edge_claim
supersession_notes.p211r_manual_bonf: Manual alpha/K in p211r — replaced by bonferroni_correction()

final_decision: P252D complete. correction_gate.py SSOT implemented at lottery_api/utils/correction_gate.py. 5 pure-Python functions cover M6 multiple testing correction gap from P252B. Bonferroni and BH-FDR verified against known examples. Deterministic, no DB access, no forbidden imports. No DB write. No registry mutation. No strategy promotion. No betting advice. Recommended next: P252E — implement M5 permutation_test.py SSOT (P0 priority).
